name: Tangy Grilled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. For the marinade, combine 1/2 cup of vinegar, sage, garlic, and poultry seasoning in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil over high heat, then let cool to room temperature.
2. In a large bowl, beat the egg. Gradually whisk in the oil, salt, and pepper. Then whisk in the remaining 1 1/2 cups vinegar and the cooled vinegar mixture.
3. Add the chicken pieces to the marinade, tossing to coat. Cover and refrigerate for 3 to 4 hours.
4. About 30 minutes before grilling, remove the chicken from the refrigerator.
5. Prepare the grill for indirect heat by placing a disposable foil roasting pan in the bottom center of the grill. Arrange 20 charcoal briquettes on each of two opposite sides of the foil pan. Ignite the charcoal.
6. When white ash has formed, remove the chicken from the marinade and grill over medium-low coals for about 30-35 minutes, turning occasionally, until juices run clear when pierced with a fork. Makes 8 servings.
